work_unit: SZ-SH-M-001: No storage quota handling for HistoryItem thumbnails
situation: chrome.storage.local has 10MB default quota. saveHistoryItem writes entire history array (up to 50 items × ~5-10KB each with base64 thumbnails + CountResult.details) without catching QuotaExceededError. When quota is hit, write silently fails and newest history item is lost with no user feedback.
action: Added isQuotaError() detector and progressive eviction loop to saveHistoryItem. On QuotaExceededError, drops oldest entries one-by-one until write succeeds or MIN_HISTORY_KEEP=5 reached. Non-quota errors re-thrown. cp-guard triggered (storage.ts diverged in worktree from prior unmerged commits), used case-104 direct wt commit escape hatch.
outcome_evidence: Commit 47f7516 on auto/opt-shizi-1783404582 pushed to origin. 1 file changed, 41 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-). Adds isQuotaError helper + try/catch with progressive eviction in saveHistoryItem.
next_suggestion: SZ-SH-M-002: Source manifest lacks CSP; build.mjs adds wasm-unsafe-eval — dev/prod divergence
SZ-SH-M-003: esbuild minification without sourcemaps makes production debugging impossible
